summary: Completed testing of PlayXBets simplified UI changes. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: MATCH_ODDS shows 2 cells per team (1 Back + 1 Lay), NO Bookmaker sections visible, Session Markets use bright red (#dc2626) for No and bright blue (#2563eb) for Yes, Tied Match uses same colors, ODDS|MATCHED BET tabs working, User sidebar has Recharge History link.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified UI changes verified. Key findings: (1) MATCH_ODDS now shows only 2 cells per team (1 Back + 1 Lay) instead of 6 cells (3-level order book), (2) Bookmaker sections completely removed from frontend (backend still returns data but frontend doesn't display it), (3) Session Markets use bright red #dc2626 for No buttons and bright blue #2563eb for Yes buttons, (4) Tied Match section uses same bright colors, (5) Session Markets show SUSPENDED label for completed overs (data-testid='session-suspended-label'), (6) Backend scheduler intervals all set to 10 seconds for live_match_polling, fetch_cricket_job, and fetch_odds_interval, (7) User sidebar has Recharge History link at /user/recharges.

match_odds_simplified.details: MATCH_ODDS shows 2 cells per team (1 Back + 1 Lay) - verified via Playwright

bookmaker_sections_removed.details: No Bookmaker text or sections found on match page - verified via Playwright

session_markets_colors.details: No buttons use bg-[#dc2626] (red), Yes buttons use bg-[#2563eb] (blue) - verified in code

tied_match_colors.details: Same bright colors used - No column red, Yes column blue - verified in code

session_suspended_label.details: SUSPENDED label with data-testid='session-suspended-label' for completed overs - verified in code

backend_scheduler_10s.details: All 3 scheduler jobs use IntervalTrigger(seconds=10) - verified at lines 1285, 1293, 1301

odds_matched_tabs.details: ODDS | MATCHED BET tabs working correctly - verified via Playwright

bet_placement.details: Back and Lay bet placement working via POST /api/bets

user_sidebar_recharge_history.details: Recharge History link present in UserLayout.js sidebar at /user/recharges

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/match_page_simplified_iteration16.png - Match page showing simplified MATCH_ODDS (2 cells per team)
